response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform work — core requirements for this role. Their expertise centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-industrial C++ exposure from 2014–2015, making them a poor fit for the role’s technical and domain-specific demands.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience for high-performance industrial systems
Lacks demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
No cloud platform (Azure) or on-prem industrial automation project history
